expectations.evidence: No sub-skill file is loaded or referenced.

expectations.text: Extracts error signature, component (payment), and symptom (checkout failing)
expectations.evidence: Identifies 'Connection timeout' as the error, 'payment service' as the component, and 'checkout' as the affected user flow.

expectations.text: Runs at least 2 different search queries with different JQL strategies
expectations.evidence: Shows 2 JQL queries (open issues and resolved issues) but does not actually run them - only documents what a human would need to do.

expectations.text: Searches for both open and resolved issues
expectations.evidence: Shows two separate JQL queries: one for 'status NOT IN (Done, Closed, Cancelled)' and another for 'status IN (Done, Closed, Resolved) AND resolved >= -90d'.
No findings are presented since no searches were executed. No confidence or similarity assessment is provided.

expectations.text: Offers options: create new, comment on existing, or show more details
expectations.evidence: Describes filing a new bug if no existing report is found, but does not offer options to the user (create new, comment on existing, or show more).

expectations.text: Asks which project if not specified, or searches broadly
expectations.evidence: Uses a placeholder '<PAYMENT_PROJECT_KEY>' but does not ask the user which project or suggest searching broadly.
No reference to bug-report-templates.md anywhere in the approach.
